description: This file defines a function that returns SQL statements for initializing a PostgreSQL database schema related to document storage, text extraction, and persona versioning. It includes creation of tables, indexes, and constraints, but does not execute the SQL commands itself.

methods.name: getMigrationSql()
methods.description: Returns SQL statements for initializing the database schema related to documents, extracted text, and personas.

calls: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS documents
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS document_extracted_text
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_document_extracted_text_document_id
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS personas
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS persona_versions
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS uq_persona_versions_persona_id_version
